content_body:
Imagine giving your family a gift that brings more than fleeting excitement—a gift that inspires lifelong memories, recharges the soul, and creates wonder. This year, skip the crowded malls and endless online searches and, instead, treat your family and friends with the ultimate Christmas experience: a Christmas cabin rental. 

Just 2 short hours north of Atlanta, Blue Ridge, GA lies in the heart of the North Georgia Mountains and transforms into a magical holiday destination every December. With cozy luxury cabins, festive activities, unique shopping opportunities, and an array of dining options, a visit to Blue Ridge offers a heartwarming experience that all will cherish.

Holiday Cabins: Your Home for the Holidays

Our luxury Blue Ridge cabins for Christmas redefine comfort and luxury, especially during the holidays. Picture this: you arrive at your beautifully decorated cabin, twinkling lights and garlands adorning a Christmas tree in the center of the living room while relaxing jazz plays on the TV to welcome you. The majority of our vacation rentals are fully decked for Christmas, bringing the festive spirit right to your doorstep.

In need of firewood? Use our convenient firewood delivery service, ensuring the wood-burning fireplaces stay roaring during your getaway. 

At Cabin Rentals of Georgia, our amenities go above and beyond—private hot tubs with mountain views, outdoor fire pits perfect for s'mores and stargazing, and plush interiors with fully stocked kitchens. Whether you’re sipping cocoa by the indoor or outdoor fire, soaking in a relaxing hot tub under the stars, or relishing the sounds of the Toccoa River from your deck, these luxurious cozy Christmas cabins in Blue Ridge provide an idyllic holiday escape.

In case you thought it could not get any better, most of our luxury mountain cabin rentals are pet-friendly! Don't leave your best friend at home this season and celebrate Christmas in the mountains with the entire family.

The Experience: Festive Fun for Everyone

A Christmas vacation in Blue Ridge isn’t complete without immersing yourself in the area's festive activities while creating your own Christmas traditions in a mountain town. One of the highlights is the Santa Express Christmas Train. Operated by the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway, this enchanting journey takes you and your family on a magical ride from Blue Ridge to McCaysville, GA/Copperhill, TN for an afternoon of exploration and enjoyment. Children can meet Santa, enjoy Christmas carols, and savor holiday treats, making it a cherished tradition for families.

In downtown Blue Ridge, you’ll find quaint boutiques brimming with holiday cheer. Explore Bungalow Bleu offering one-of-a-kind ornaments, handmade gifts, and festive décor. Afterward, consider a romantic date at Roo Mountain Vineyards or Living Water Winery, where you can sample award-winning Georgia wines while basking in the holiday ambiance of their rustic tasting rooms and breathtaking, panoramic mountain views.

During the evenings, catch a show at the Blue Ridge Community Theatre. Drawing from the pool of local talent, their Christmas shows are always one for the books. Don't miss an exciting performance during your visit. Afterwards, head across the street to go ice skating with Blue Ridge On Ice!

Gift-Giving: Find Treasures in Downtown Blue Ridge

No Christmas vacation is complete without festive Christmas shopping with Christmas carols playing outside. Downtown Blue Ridge is all decked out for Christmas and offers a delightful assortment of shops perfect for finding unique gifts for everyone on your list - even yourself! 

  • Blue Ridge Olive Oil Company: Discover an incredible selection of infused olive oils, balsamic vinegars, and flavored salts—a thoughtful gift for the culinary enthusiast in your life.
  • Paradise Beauty Company: Pamper loved ones with clean and luxurious bath and body products, including face masks, cosmetics, silky pajama sets, and so much more.
  • Other charming boutiques and galleries line Main Street, offering artisan jewelry, home décor, and other one-of-a-kind treasures.

With its festive lights and welcoming atmosphere, downtown Blue Ridge is the perfect place to pick up heartfelt gifts while supporting local businesses. Experience the peak of the Christmas spirit in our small town as your favorite holiday tunes escort you through our favorite small businesses. 

Restaurants: Culinary Delights with Holiday Flair

Blue Ridge’s dining scene becomes even more magical during the holidays. For a memorable meal, visit The Pasta Market, where you’ll enjoy freshly made pasta dishes and warm, comforting flavors perfect for the chilly season. Whether you’re indulging in a romantic dinner or a family feast, Blue Ridge’s restaurants offer something for everyone.

Cozy Up with Coffee: Mountain Mama’s Coffee Lounge

Start your mornings or end your afternoons with a stop at Mountain Mama’s Coffee Lounge, where their newly released holiday menu is a treat in itself. From peppermint mochas to a yule-inspired latte, their seasonal drinks are the perfect way to warm up after exploring town or hiking trails. Pair your drink with one of their freshly baked pastries, and you’ll have a cozy moment to savor amid the holiday bustle.

Relax and Recharge: Tea Trees Spa

For a truly relaxing holiday treat, schedule some time at Tea Tree's Boutique Spa. Their expert team offers rejuvenating massages, facials, and body treatments to help you unwind. Combat holiday stress and enjoy a little self-care during your vacation. Whether you’re treating yourself or gifting a session to a loved one, Tea Tree's Spa adds a touch of luxury to your Blue Ridge Christmas.

Hear It from Our Guests: Testimonials

Don’t just take our word for it—here’s what past guests have to say about spending Christmas in Blue Ridge:

Six of us (3 couples) stayed at this property from 12/23 to 12/28 and it was amazing. The cabin was decorated beautifully for Christmas and even had a tree which was a lovely touch. The river rock accents throughout the cabin are amazing, especially in the bathrooms where you felt like you were taking a shower in a waterfall. We had plenty of room - each of us had our own floor and bathroom - which gave us all privacy if we wanted. We played games downstairs, enjoyed the hot tub and thoroughly relaxed. We had plenty of hot water & the washer/dryer came in very handy.

We did a fair bit of cooking and I have to comment on how well the kitchen was stocked with dishes, pans, platters, appliances, etc. There was both a Keurig and a drip coffee maker, lots of Tupperware & serving bowls and everything else you can think of. We enjoyed the patio fireplace and the quietness of the area. We did lots of exploring, hiking, shopping & eating and the cabin location, although a little far from downtown, was within easy driving distance from everything. I would highly recommend this cabin - it was clean upon arrival and we did not experience any issues.

– Aska Escape Lodge

Thank you for the privilege of letting us spend our Christmas in this beautiful cabin. The view is killer, the waterfall shower made us feel something like celebrities, and the atmosphere reminded us to spend less time with our devices and more time with each other. 

– Cohutta Sunset

Make This Christmas Magical

This year, give the gift of an unforgettable experience—a Blue Ridge vacation that combines the comforts of home, the excitement of festive activities, and the beauty of the Blue Ridge Mountains. From luxury cabins and gourmet dining to unique shopping and holiday events, Blue Ridge is the ultimate destination for a Christmas filled with joy and wonder.

Ready to plan your Blue Ridge Christmas vacation? Book your stay online or over the phone today and start counting down to a holiday you’ll never forget. Call us 706-432-2140
title: The Ultimate Christmas Gift: A Blue Ridge Vacation
